{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Karoshan planets
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Swarm-Queen]] must be dealt with before she reaches [[Karoshan planets]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c39">''The Knight'', chapter 39</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
